title: Transport error code format inconsistency: {code:#010x} vs 0x{:08x}
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs Error::Transport formats the code as '{code:#010x}' (Rust format, includes '0x' prefix, 10 chars total = '0x' + 8 digits). wolftpm/src/error.rs TpmRc::Display uses '0x{:08x}' (8 digits, always 10 chars with prefix). Both produce the same output. But the two different format string spellings will confuse contributors who look at one and copy the other's style. One of the two locations should be changed to match for consistency.
